data.title: Herbalife Announces Pricing of $800 Million Aggregate Principal Amount of Senior Secured Notes Offering
data.description: Herbalife Ltd., a worldwide health and wellness company, disclosed the pricing of its recent offering through its subsidiaries HLF Financing SaRL, LLC and Herbalife International, Inc. The offering consists of $800 million aggregate principal amount of senior secured notes due 2033, known as the "Notes," which were priced at 100.00% of par for the public. The Notes come with a fixed annual interest rate of 7.750%.

data.title: Oasis Welcomes ISS Support for Independent Investigation at Kao EGM and Responds to Kao’s Latest Disclosures: Why Every Shareholder Should Vote FOR Independent Investigators on April 30
data.description: In Hong Kong, Oasis Management Company Ltd., which manages private funds holding a 12.5% stake in Kao Corporation, has expressed positivity as proxy advisor ISS recently suggested shareholders support the nomination of independent investigators at the upcoming Kao Extraordinary General Meeting. ISS emphasized significant worries related to supply chain risks, regulatory compliance, and governance issues as reasons supporting the proposal. Cheers from Oasis Management on the ISS recommendation.

data.title: STATEMENT FROM LIVE NATION ENTERTAINMENT
data.description: On April 15, 2026 in Los Angeles, the recent jury verdict is just one step in the legal process. The final decision on liability and damages will depend on upcoming motions. Live Nation plans to file a motion for judgment soon, pending additional legal proceedings to determine the validity of the current rulings. This development follows a series of hearings and the Court is expected to rule on these matters with potential impact on the case's outcome.

data.title: Hotels.com Rolls Out Revamped Rewards Programme, Offering Members £100 in Hotels.comCash After Every 10 Eligible Hotel Nights
data.description: A new loyalty program, Hotels.com® Rewards, has been launched in the UK by Hotels.com, providing members with £100 in Hotels.comCash™ after completing 10 qualifying hotel stays. The updated program simplifies the reward process for Hotels.com members: stay 10 nights at eligible hotels and receive £100 back to use for future stays. The loyalty program by Hotels.com is designed to offer a transparent and adaptable experience, where each £1 in Hotels.comCash is equivalent to £1, and can be utilized for bookings at hundreds of thousands of hotels.

data.title: Permian Resources Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Midland, Texas-based Permian Resources Corporation (NYSE: PR) has disclosed its plan to release Q1 2026 financial and operational figures post-market close on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The company will hold an earnings conference call the next day, May 7, 2026, scheduled for 9:00 a.m. Central Time (10:00 a.m. Eastern Time). Those interested can join the call by dialing (800) 715-9871 using the Conference ID: 1442298.

data.title: New Statewide Polling Shows Illinois Voters Want to Preserve Energy Choice
data.description: Results from a survey sponsored by the Clean Energy Choice Coalition highlight strong backing for energy choice and decreased government regulations among Illinois residents. The survey, conducted in Springfield, Illinois on April 15, 2026, revealed widespread support for these initiatives. The Clean Energy Choice Coalition (CECC) and its affiliates, in collaboration with Senators Sue, reported that the majority of Illinois residents favor energy choice and a reduction in governmental restrictions. This data demonstrates the positive reception energy choice has garnered in the state.

data.title: Ross Bhappu to Take Over as CEO of Energy Fuels as Company Enters Next Phase of Growth
data.description: On April 15, 2026, Energy Fuels Inc. appointed Ross R. Bhappu as their new Chief Executive Officer. Energy Fuels Inc. is a prominent U.S. producer of uranium, rare earths, and critical materials. Ross R. Bhappu assumed the position on the same day. The company is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol UUUU and on the TSX as EFR.

data.title: RIKEN Scales Quantum-Supercomputing in Japan with Quantinuum System Upgrade
data.description: Quantinuum revealed their H2 quantum computer's role in advancing pharmaceutical and materials science research via the Reimei-Fugaku hybrid compute platform in Tokyo on April 15, 2026. This significant development by the top quantum computing company will enhance the accuracy and scope of research efforts. This collaboration involves RIKEN, a renowned research institution in Japan, marking a substantial step towards scientific innovation. The advanced technology aims to revolutionize the field by leveraging the immense computing power of the H2 quantum computer.

data.title: Anycubic Showcases Next-Generation 3D Printing Lineup at RAPID+TCT 2026, Highlighting Multicolor FDM and Large-Format Resin Innovation
data.description: A company named Anycubic, well-known for producing desktop 3D printers and materials worldwide, unveiled its new product range at the RAPID+TCT 2026 event in Boston from April 14 to 16, located at Booth #1035 in the Boston Convention & Exhibition Center. This presentation followed a successful build-up before the event, showcasing their latest offerings to attendees.
